name: Molasses Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your bread machine to the light setting.
2. Add all ingredients in the order specified by your machine manufacturer's instructions.
3. For a Hitachi 101, warm the liquid in the microwave for about one minute before adding it to the bread pan.
4. The recipe yields a tall loaf of bread.
5. If using a different brand or model of bread machine, you may need to adjust ingredient quantities according to their specifications.
Note: This recipe was courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp from Columbia, Maryland.
